creator: lcook@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 218503
broot-1.0.1.diff

* Added optional CLIPBOARD feature
  (X11 clipboard support).
* Enable CLIENT_SERVER and CLIPBOARD
  features by default.

Changelog:

 * https://github.com/canop/broot/releases/v1.0.1

QA:

 * portlint: OK (looks fine).
 * testport: OK (poudriere: 12.1-RELEASE-p8, amd64).

MFH: No (Feature changes).
